IWriteOnlyExtendedDataProviderTGetExtendedDataAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the extended data object for the supplied list of entities.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ExtendedData
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task<IWriteExtendedData<T>> GetExtendedDataAsync(
	IReadOnlyList<IEntity> entities,
	IRequest request,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)
